subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter arrived and the fragrant musk which you had sent was received. Regarding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مسکی که ارسال نموده بودید واصل گردید در خصوص
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
